message:
fix(linalg): replace trivial batch_solve test with meaningful diagonal system verification

The previous batch_solve test used two stacked 3x3 identity matrices solved
against all-ones, which was trivially correct (X=B) and didn't exercise the
actual broadcast or solve logic. Replaces with two stacked 2x2 diagonal
systems (diag(2,3) and diag(4,5)) solved against the 2x2 identity, verifying
X0 = diag(1/2, 1/3) and X1 = diag(1/4, 1/5) with explicit per-element
tolerance assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
